title: hieracium murorum subsp. pseudoconfluens
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudoconfluens, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudoconfluens include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudoconfluens include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
